info.title: AP | Vendor management
info.description:
BILL is a cloud-based cash flow management system for an organization's Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) automation.
 * **AP**: Automate workflows to pay vendors bills at scale for the goods and services they provide. Pay vendors with a wide range of payment methods. Generate vendor credits, bill credits, and payment disbursement reports.
 * **AR**: Automate workflows to get paid by customers at scale for the goods and services you provide. Generate and send invoices on a schedule, generate customer and invoice credits, and seamlessly charge authorized customers.
 * **Organization**: Manage your bank accounts (for sending and receiving payments), users (with user roles), and sync with your choice of accounting software.

Integrate with the BILL API to send and receive payments for your business. See [Support Center](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us) for resources about using the BILL web app.

post.description:
Create a vendor object.

Vendor address details are required for paying the vendor by check or for inviting the vendor to join the BILL network. Keep this information current at all times.
* `nameOnCheck`
* `address1`
* `addressCity`
* `addressState`
* `addressZip`
* `addressCountry`

### What is a vendor?
A vendor is an organization that you pay for goods and services they provide.

Vendors and customers using BILL can be connected to each other in the BILL network. Network connections between vendors and customers enable electronic payments between them.

International vendors are vendors outside the US. See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center to learn about supported countries and currencies.

You can create a new vendor object with `/v2/Crud/Create/Vendor.json` for a vendor not using BILL. When you pay this vendor, BILL sends a payment check or electronic payment to the vendor.

You can enable electronic payments for a created vendor in two ways.
* Send the vendor an invite to join BILL with `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`
* Add vendor bank account information with `/v2/Crud/Create/VendorBankAccount.json`

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:
Update a vendor object. See [Create a vendor](ref:ap-vendormgmt-createvendor) for more information about vendors.

**Note**: Updating a specific set of vendor fields require an MFA-trusted API session. See [Generate MFA challenge](ref:auth-mfachallenge) for more information.

* `address1`
* `address2`
* `address3`
* `address4`
* `addressCity`
* `addressState`
* `addressZip`
* `addressCountry`
* `email`

post.description:
Create a vendor bank account object.

**Note**: A vendor can have only one active bank account. You must delete a bank account (with `/v2/Crud/Delete/VendorBankAccount.json`) before adding a new bank account.

### Prerequisites
This is an MFA protected endpoint. Create an MFA-protected API session with `/v2/Login.json` before using `/v2/Crud/Create/VendorBankAccount.json`.

### What is a vendor bank account?
A vendor bank account is required for enabling electronic payments for the vendor. BILL encrypts and securely stores bank account and routing number information. Only the last four digits are visible with the API and Web app.

When you add a vendor bank account, the account `status` is `1` (Verified). BILL sends a test deposit to the bank account within one or two business days. This is to confirm whether the bank account is able to receive payments.

If the vendor bank account status is `3` (Blocked), `4` (Expired), or `5` (Invalid), the vendor’s `payBy` method for BILL payments is reverted to `0` (Check).

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

name.description: Unique vendor name. This value is set for check and electronic payments if `nameOnCheck` is not set.

shortName.description: Name for identifying the vendor in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

nameOnCheck.description: Vendor name for check and electronic payments. The `name` value is used if `nameOnCheck` is not set.

accNumber.description:
User account number set by the vendor. This value is useful for vendor services such as utility or credit card bills.

For vendor payments, this value is set on the check memo or electronic payment record.

track1099.description: Set as `true` if the vendor is eligible to receive an IRS form 1099 from the payer

addressState.description: Vendor address state. Two-letter abbreviation for a US state.

addressCountry.description:
Vendor address country.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

paymentEmail.description: Vendor email address for payment notifications. The `email` value is used if `paymentEmail` is not set.

paymentPhone.description: Vendor phone number for payment notifications

accountType.description:
Vendor account type.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

paymentTermId.description: BILL-generated payment term ID for the vendor. The payment term defines when a payment is sent. This is an accounts tracking object.

sendNotifications.description: Set as `true` if the vendor receives BILL notifications

externalBillPayIn12m.description: Bill payments made to the vendor in the last 12 months recorded in your choice of accounting software

since.description: Vendor since date. Year in the YYYY format.

payDaysBefore.description: Vendor payment lead time in days

enabledCombinePayments.description: Set as `true` if multiple bills with the same processing date are combined into one payment to the vendor

billCurrency.description:
Vendor bill currency. Three-letter abbreviation.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

billSyncPref.description:
Vendor bill sync with your choice of accounting software.
* `0`: Sync
* `1`: Do not sync

prefPmtMethod.description:
Preferred payment method.
* `0`: Card
* `1`: Other
* `7`: Virtual card (Vendor Direct)

bankCountry.description:
Vendor bank country.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

sendInviteForPrivateVendor.description: Set as `true` to send a BILL invitation to the vendor with profile visibility set as private

vendorVCardRemitEmail.description: Virtual card (Vendor Direct) remittance email address set for the vendor

vendorVCardStatus.description:
Virtual card (Vendor Direct) enrollment status for the vendor.
* `-1`: Unknown
* `0`: Open
* `1`: Pending
* `2`: More information required
* `3`: Pay for you (Vendor accepts payments over a phone call or the vendor’s online payment portal)
* `4`: Phone number required
* `5`: Enrolled
* `6`: Declined

orgVCardStatus.description:
Organization virtual card (Vendor Direct) enrollment status for the vendor.
* `0`: Opt out
* `1`: Opt in
* `2`: Never call

prefRemitEmail.description:
Preferred remittance email address.
* `0`: Not set
* `1`: `remitEmail` value
* `2`: `vendorVCardRemitEmail` value

remitEmail.description: Remittance email set for the vendor

processorVCardStatus.description:
Virtual card (Vendor Direct) processor enrollment status.
* `-1`: Unknown
* `0`: Open
* `1`: Pending
* `2`: More information required
* `3`: Pay for you (Vendor accepts payments over a phone call or the vendor’s online payment portal)
* `4`: Phone number required
* `5`: Enrolled
* `6`: Declined
* `7`: VCard processor confirmed and vendor enrolled
* `8`: Recruiting
* `9`: Verbal commitment
* `10`: Payer assist
* `11`: On hold

vStatusUpdateSource.description:
Virtual card (Vendor Direct) status update source.
* `0`: BILL operations
* `1`: Payer
* `2`: Processor
* `3`: Comdata webhook (Virtual card number creation request)
* `4`: Comdata infoburst (Virtual card transaction response)
* `5`: Business profile for vendor
* `6`: BILL system
* `7`: Vendor
* `8`: Customer

orgVCardOptOutCustReason.description:
AP organization virtual card (Vendor Direct) opt-out reason by customer.
* `0`: Vendor does not accept cards
* `1`: Vendor charges fees
* `2`: Vendor prefers a different payment method
* `3`: Vendor has trouble receiving virtual card (Vendor Direct)
* `4`: Customer decided not to pay with virtual card (Vendor Direct)
* `5`: Other

enableFundedInvite.description: Set as `true` if funded invites are enabled for converting the check vendor to electronic payments

numberOfInvitesSent.description: Number of connection invites sent to the vendor

eligibleForEbills.description: Set as `true` if the vendor is eligible for eBills

acknowledgedEbillBanner.description: Set as `true` if the vendor acknowledged the eBills banner

acknowledgedEbillError.description: Set as `true` if the vendor acknowledged the eBills error

eBillEnablementFailed.description: Set as `true` if the vendor eBill enablement failed

unmodifiedBillsCount.description: Count of consecutive unmodified bills from this vendor

setupAutoPayPrompt.description: Set as `true` if the the setup autopay prompt is shown to the vendor

creationSource.description:
Vendor creation source in the BILL web app.
* `1`: Created with **Enter a bill** or **Pay a vendor**
* `2`: Added from the BILL network with **Enter a bill** or **Pay a vendor**
* `3`: Created with **Add Vendor**
* `4`: Created by IVA from an uploaded bill with **Enter a bill**
* `6`: Added from the BILL network with **NETWORK** in the header
* `7`: Added with Sync
* `8`: Added with **Import Vendor(s)** (CSV)
* `9`: Added with **Inbox**

eBillEnabledStatus.description:
eBill status.
* `0`: Disabled
* `1`: Enabled
* `2`: Pending
* `3`: Delayed
* `4`: Switched off

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the vendor. The value begins with `009`.

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

name.description: Unique vendor name. This value is set for check and electronic payments if `nameOnCheck` is not set.

shortName.description: Name for identifying the vendor in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

nameOnCheck.description: Vendor name for check and electronic payments. The `name` value is used if `nameOnCheck` is not set.

accNumber.description:
User account number set by the vendor. This value is useful for vendor services such as utility or credit card bills.

For vendor payments, this value is set on the check memo or electronic payment record.

track1099.description: Set as `true` if the vendor is eligible to receive an IRS form 1099 from the payer

payBy.description:
Payment method for BILL payments.
* `0`: Check
* `1`: ACH
* `2`: ACH to verified national vendor
* `5`: International ePayment
* `6`: Offline
* `11`: Instant Transfer (Wallet)

**Note**: See `PrefPmtMethod` for the virtual card (Vendor Direct) payment method.

paymentEmail.description: Vendor email address for payment notifications. The `email` value is used if `paymentEmail` is not set.

paymentPhone.description: Vendor phone number for payment notifications

mergeIntoId.description: Parent vendor ID that the current ID is merged into

accountType.description:
Vendor account type.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

paymentTermId.description: BILL-generated payment term ID for the vendor. The payment term defines when a payment is sent. This is an accounts tracking object.

sendNotifications.description: Set as `true` if the vendor receives BILL notifications

lastBalanceUpdate.description: Vendor account balance last update date and time

externalBillPayIn12m.description: Bill payments made to the vendor in the last 12 months recorded in your choice of accounting software

since.description: Vendor since date. Year in the YYYY format.

payDaysBefore.description: Vendor payment lead time in days

enabledCombinePayments.description: Set as `true` if multiple bills with the same processing date are combined into one payment to the vendor

hasBankAccountAutoPay.description: Set as `true` if the vendor has bank account auto-pay enabled

hasRecurringPayments.description: Set as `true` if the vendor has recurring payments enabled

billSyncPref.description:
Vendor bill sync with your choice of accounting software.
* `0`: Sync
* `1`: Do not sync

prefPmtMethod.description:
Preferred payment method.
* `0`: Card
* `1`: Other
* `7`: Virtual card (Vendor Direct)

bankCountry.description:
Vendor bank country.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

vendorBankAccountStatus.description:
Vendor bank account status.
* `-1`: No bank account
* `0`: Bank account not linked
* `1`: Bank account linked

sendInviteForPrivateVendor.description: Set as `true` to send a BILL invitation to the vendor with profile visibility set as private

vendorVCardRemitEmail.description: Virtual card (Vendor Direct) remittance email address set for the vendor

vendorVCardStatus.description:
Virtual card (Vendor Direct) enrollment status for the vendor.
* `-1`: Unknown
* `0`: Open
* `1`: Pending
* `2`: More information required
* `3`: Pay for you (Vendor accepts payments over a phone call or the vendor’s online payment portal)
* `4`: Phone number required
* `5`: Enrolled
* `6`: Declined

orgVCardStatus.description:

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the vendor. The value begins with `009`.

field.description: Field name. See the response body documentation to learn about fields that you can filter with. Filterable fields are marked with `You can filter with this field.`

op.description:
Operator symbol.
* `=`: Equals
* `<`: Less than
* `>`: Greater than
* `!=`: Not equal
* `<=`: Less than or equal to
* `>=`: Greater than or equal to
* `in`: Value in list
* `nin`: Value not in list

asc.description:
Sort order.
* `true`: Ascending order
* `false`: Descending order

nested.description: Set as `true` to include additional nested data in the response

Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the vendor. The value begins with `009`. You can filter with this field.

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app. You can filter with this field.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

name.description: Unique vendor name. This value is set for check and electronic payments if `nameOnCheck` is not set.

shortName.description: Name for identifying the vendor in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

nameOnCheck.description: Vendor name for check and electronic payments. The `name` value is used if `nameOnCheck` is not set.

accNumber.description:
User account number set by the vendor. This value is useful for vendor services such as utility or credit card bills.

For vendor payments, this value is set on the check memo or electronic payment record.

taxIdType.description:
Tax ID type. You can filter with this field.
* `1`: EIN
* `2`: SSN

track1099.description: Set as `true` if the vendor is eligible to receive an IRS form 1099 from the payer. You can filter with this field.

payBy.description:
Payment method for BILL payments. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: Check
* `1`: ACH
* `2`: ACH to verified national vendor
* `5`: International ePayment
* `6`: Offline
* `11`: Instant Transfer (Wallet)

**Note**: See `PrefPmtMethod` for the virtual card (Vendor Direct) payment method.

paymentEmail.description: Vendor email address for payment notifications. The `email` value is used if `paymentEmail` is not set.

paymentPhone.description: Vendor phone number for payment notifications

createdTime.description: Created date and time. You can filter with this field.

updatedTime.description: Updated date and time. You can filter with this field.

mergeIntoId.description: Parent vendor ID that the current ID is merged into

accountType.description:
Vendor account type. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

paymentTermId.description: BILL-generated payment term ID for the vendor. The payment term defines when a payment is sent. This is an accounts tracking object.

sendNotifications.description: Set as `true` if the vendor receives BILL notifications. You can filter with this field.

balance.description: Vendor account balance. You can filter with this field.

lastBalanceUpdate.description: Vendor account balance last update date and time. You can filter with this field.

externalBillPayIn12m.description: Bill payments made to the vendor in the last 12 months recorded in your choice of accounting software

since.description: Vendor since date. Year in the YYYY format.

payDaysBefore.description: Vendor payment lead time in days

enabledCombinePayments.description: Set as `true` if multiple bills with the same processing date are combined into one payment to the vendor. You can filter with this field.

hasBankAccountAutoPay.description: Set as `true` if the vendor has bank account auto-pay enabled

hasRecurringPayments.description: Set as `true` if the vendor has recurring payments enabled

billCurrency.description: Vendor bill currency. You can filter with this field.

paymentCurrency.description: Payment currency. Three-letter abbreviation. You can filter with this field.

billSyncPref.description:
Vendor bill sync with your choice of accounting software. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: Sync
* `1`: Do not sync

prefPmtMethod.description:
Preferred payment method. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: Card
* `1`: Other
* `7`: Virtual card (Vendor Direct)

bankCountry.description:
Vendor bank country. You can filter with this field.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

vendorBankAccountStatus.description:
Vendor bank account status.
* `-1`: No bank account
* `0`: Bank account not linked
* `1`: Bank account linked

sendInviteForPrivateVendor.description: Set as `true` to send a BILL invitation to the vendor with profile visibility set as private. You can filter with this field.

* `4`: Expired
* `5`: Invalid

isSavings.description:
Vendor bank account type. You can filter with this field.
* `true`: Savings account
* `false`: Checking account

isPersonalAcct.description:
Vendor bank account owner type. You can filter with this field.
* `true`: Personal account
* `false`: Business account

intlEPaymentAcct.description: Set as `true` if the bank account is eligible for international ePayments. You can filter with this field.

intlPaymentType.description:
International ePayment type. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Wire
* `2`: International ACH

paymentCurrency.description: Vendor bank account payment currency. Three-letter abbreviation. You can filter with this field.

bankCountry.description:
Vendor bank country. You can filter with this field.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

bankAddSource.description:
Bank account addition source. You can filter with this field.
* `1`: Not available
* `2`: User manual
* `3`: User IVA
* `4`: Vendor portal
* `5`: User clone
* `6`: International processor migration

regulatory1.description: Regulatory data field 1. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

regulatory2.description: Regulatory data field 2. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

regulatory3.description: Regulatory data field 3. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

regulatory4.description: Regulatory data field 4. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

regulatory5.description: Regulatory data field 5. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

regulatory6.description: Regulatory data field 6. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

regulatory7.description: Regulatory data field 7. This field is available only for select BILL partners.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the vendor bank account. The value begins with `vba`.

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.
